gist.headline: AI video in your pocket
gist.blurb: PollenHours just sprouted in the Greenhouse! It's a clever mobile-first AI video pipeline built to run right on your Android device via Termux.
gist.summary: Added PollenHours, a mobile-first AI video pipeline built for Termux on Android, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover and use a new tool for generating AI video directly from their mobile devices.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a tiny Android smartphone displaying a video play button, standing inside a cozy greenhouse with code-plants. The robot companion looks on excitedly.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a tiny glowing smartphone showing a video play button, standing inside a warm greenhouse filled with lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head peeks over her shoulder in amazement. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
